name: Alo Hayati
overview: A true gem from the golden era of Lebanese television, Alo Hayati is one of the iconic series that defined Arab drama in the 1970s. When the devoted Anwar helps the ambitious Nada pursue her dream of becoming a lawyer, what begins as a story of support and dedication slowly transforms into something far more complicated. Their engagement brings new tensions to the surface, proving that love, for all its beauty, is rarely straightforward.
